content_of_post_to_answer: I overthink a lot. Why is it so hard to say your feelings?
answer: Overthinking often makes expressing feelings difficult because the mind tries to solve every possible reaction before taking the risk of being honest. We confuse clarity with certainty, but feelings rarely arrive perfectly explained. I've explored this pattern in more detail on my profile for anyone who wants to go deeper. Sometimes the hardest words to say are not the ones we don't know; they are the ones we fear will change how someone sees us.
